overall.description: Gameplay footage from Cyberpunk 2077 showing a first-person walk through a futuristic neon-lit city at sunset. The player character walks along wet sidewalks past the Caliente resort tower, passes under an overpass, crosses a major intersection with holographic billboards, and continues toward the setting sun.

scene_state.functional_zone: futuristic commercial boulevard with neon storefronts

agents.ego_description: walking steadily along the sidewalk next to busy traffic, observing the sunset ahead

notable_agents.action: futuristic silver sedan driving past on the wet multi-lane road

entered.detail: tall orange and teal resort tower with large illuminated CALIENTE signage at the top
tall palm trees lining the right side of the street against the sunset
modern glass structures with glowing neon advertisements and signage
reflective asphalt surface with multiple lanes of moving traffic
various illuminated store signs and digital displays on building facades

segments.scene_description: Walking along a futuristic commercial boulevard at golden hour, with intense sunset glare and lens flare directly ahead. The wet asphalt reflects the warm sunlight and surrounding neon lights as vehicles pass by on the multi-lane road. The iconic Caliente resort tower dominates the view ahead, growing larger as the camera approaches.

scene_state.functional_zone: covered pedestrian walkway under building overpass

events.description: entering the covered area beneath the building overpass, shifting from natural to artificial lighting

agents.ego_description: walking under the overpass past building entrances and staircases

entered.detail: covered pedestrian bridge connecting buildings overhead with yellow structural elements
staircase with yellow trim leading up to the Caliente building entrance
illuminated teal signage for WILD BLUE establishment on the right building

segments.scene_description: Approaching the Caliente building entrance and passing underneath the covered overpass structure. The environment shifts from bright sunset to shadowed artificial lighting with neon accents. The camera moves past the building entrance stairs and continues through the sheltered walkway.

scene_state.functional_zone: major urban intersection with holographic advertisements

events.description: exiting the covered walkway into the open intersection with full sky visibility
beginning to cross the wide intersection crosswalk with yellow striped markings

agents.ego_description: crossing the wide intersection while looking up at the towering buildings and holographic displays

notable_agents.action: pedestrian in white shirt crossing the street in the same direction

entered.detail: large digital advertising displays showing animated content on building facades
wide pedestrian crossing with bold yellow striped markings across the asphalt
modern reflective glass structures with large vertical banners across the intersection

segments.scene_description: Emerging from the covered walkway into a vast open intersection filled with massive holographic billboards and digital advertisements. The camera crosses the wide yellow-striped crosswalk while panning to look up at the towering Caliente building and surrounding glass structures. Pedestrians move in scattered directions across the intersection as vehicles navigate the streets.

events.description: finishing crossing the intersection and continuing straight toward the setting sun

agents.ego_description: continuing down the street directly toward the bright sunset with buildings on both sides

entered.detail: bright setting sun at the end of the street creating intense lens flare and warm backlighting
ground level shops and businesses with striped awnings and neon signage

segments.scene_description: Continuing across the intersection and proceeding down the open street directly toward the brilliant setting sun. The Caliente building and intersection fall behind as the camera focuses on the sunlit vista ahead. The street features ground-level storefronts with sparse pedestrian traffic as the journey continues into the warm sunset glow.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous first-person journey through a futuristic city, moving from a glare-filled boulevard into shadowed urban structures before emerging into a vast, neon-lit intersection. It begins by walking along a commercial boulevard at golden hour, where intense sunset lens flares reflect off wet asphalt as the Caliente resort tower looms ahead. As the camera approaches the tower, the environment shifts from bright sunlight to the artificial neon glow of a covered overpass and sheltered walkway. The scene then opens into a wide intersection filled with massive holographic billboards and digital advertisements, with the camera panning upward toward the surrounding glass skyscrapers while crossing a yellow-striped crosswalk. Finally, the view turns away from the towering architecture to proceed down an open street, heading directly into the brilliant, warm glow of the setting sun.
